tasks.label: Release: Bump patch & push tag
args: $csproj = 'NoteStitch/NoteStitch.csproj'; $xml = [xml](Get-Content $csproj); $ver = [version]$xml.Project.PropertyGroup.Version; $next = "{0}.{1}.{2}" -f $ver.Major,$ver.Minor,($ver.Build+1); $xml.Project.PropertyGroup.Version = $next; $xml.Save((Resolve-Path $csproj)); git add $csproj; git commit -m "chore: bump version to $next"; git tag "v$next"; git push origin main "v$next"; Write-Host "Released v$next" -ForegroundColor Green
